creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
crees       2011-10-27 09:34:24 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    japanese/pycodec     Makefile 
    japanese/pycodec-zope Makefile 
    japanese/zope-ejsplitter Makefile 
    japanese/zope-jamailhost Makefile 
  Log:
  Deprecate some ports:
  
  pycodec-zope/Makefile:DEPRECATED=       Handled in Python-2.4 and later
  pycodec/Makefile:DEPRECATED=    Handled in Python-2.4 upwards
  zope-ejsplitter/Makefile:DEPRECATED=    Plone4 has newer and better splitter mechanism than ejSplitter
  zope-jamailhost/Makefile:DEPRECATED=    Zope has changed MailHost specification and it is not sure jaMailHost works well
  
  PR:             ports/162055
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3       +3 -0      ports/japanese/pycodec-zope/Makefile
  1.21      +3 -0      ports/japanese/pycodec/Makefile
  1.8       +3 -0      ports/japanese/zope-ejsplitter/Makefile
  1.9       +3 -0      ports/japanese/zope-jamailhost/Makefile
